\begin{figure}[ht]
\centering
\includegraphics[width=0.95\linewidth]{../figures/rf_errors.pdf}
\caption{Random-feature HS output errors vs feature dimension $m$ for the random-feature sweep. Solid markers show the intrinsic random-feature approximation error ($E_{\mathrm{rf}}$); dashed lines give the finite-precision contribution ($E_{\mathrm{fp}}$).}
\label{fig:rf-errors}
\end{figure}
